response.justification: Mohammed has deep technical expertise, extensive open-source contributions, and broad experience across stacks and architectures, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML modeling — and his German is only basic, falling short of the required C1 proficiency.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse tech stacks
Active contributor to developer education through workshops and talks
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client advisory experience
Lacks documented team leadership or project management in consulting context
